title: Zhejiang University AI Policy Tracker Report - May 2026
summary: This run found one official Journal of Zhejiang University-SCIENCE generative AI policy for manuscript authorship, author responsibility, and disclosure. It did not find a centralized Zhejiang University policy for teaching, learning, assessment, student coursework, approved tools, or IT/security use. The approved claim is limited to journal publication/research integrity.
limitations: No centralized university-wide AI policy for teaching, learning, assessment, approved tools, or IT/security was found in this run.
The approved claim is limited to Journal of Zhejiang University-SCIENCE manuscript/publication policy.
Course syllabus, webinar, news, and research showcase sources were rejected as AI policy evidence.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement.
sourceRightsPolicy: Official source page retains its original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
